name: MATLAB Simulink
description: MATLAB Simulink is a useful simulation surface inside Electrical Engineering.
whyUseIt: People in Electrical Engineering use MATLAB Simulink to make the field more visible, testable, collaborative, or operational.
beginnerMistakes: Using MATLAB Simulink as a substitute for thinking instead of a way to sharpen it.
Skipping documentation and context when sharing output from MATLAB Simulink.
